title: Terrible Massacre of a Four Member  Family in Vankaalai   Sixteen  Years Ago
body_lines: (A family of four in the North – western town of Vankalai in Mannar district was brutally massacred on June 8th 2006. The persons responsible for the cruel act are yet to be brought to justice. I wrote a detailed article about the incident under the heading ”Vicious Violence Wipes Out family of four in Vankalai” for “The Morning Leader” of June 13th 2006. I am reproducing the article without changes on my blog to denote the 16th  anniversary of the horrible incident- DBSJ)

The on going ethnic fratricide in Sri Lanka has seen brutal violence on several occasions. The savagery shown in the slaying of a family of four in the North – Western village of Vankalai last Thursday (June 8th 2006) was perhaps bestiality at its worst. Even the most hardened eyes would have turned moist at the terrible sight of the four victims killed so cruelly by persons who can only be described as barbarians.

Gruesomely graphic photographs of the four victims have been displayed in various sections of the Tamil media. The father, daughter and son were hanging dead in one room while the mother was dead on the floor in another room. The intestines of the seven year old boy are seen protruding. The vaginal area of the twenty – seven year old mother and nine year old daughter were extremely bloody. It appears that the killers have sadistically tortured their victims including the thirty – eight year old father.

The scene of this terrible massacre was in a village called Vankalai in the North – Western district of Mannar. Vankalai is situated north by north – west on the mainland . It is four and a half miles away from Thallaadi military base.. It is about six miles to the South – East of Mannar town.

In recent times the people of Vankalai had been retiring to the St. Annes and other churches during nightfall. Staying at home during night was not safe due to the security situation. The victimised family too used to do that. The family had been absent from Church on Thursday night. When relatives and neighbours checked on the following morning they found the entire family dead. The victims had been hacked, beaten, tortured and hung. The mother and daughter seemed to have been violated sexually.

The brutal massacre has resulted in much tension. Though there are no eyewitnesses to the actual killing or torture the people of Vankalai suspect members of the security forces as being responsible. The state and its media have denied security force responsibilty . There has been a counter charge that the tigers were responsible. Few people in Mannar believe that. The Catholic Bishop of Mannar Joseph Rayappu has stated that those responsible for security were behind the massacre.

It is difficult to understand how people could inflict such sadistic brutality on their fellow human beings particularly little children.Some background details may help in understanding at least the context in which this vicious violence occurred.

Vankalai is a pre- dominantly fishing cum farming village. It lies along the Naanaattan road with the sea to its west. The historic Saivaite shrine Thirukketheeeswaram is further up to its North. Naanaattan is further down to its south. Towards the east the biggest village is Uyilankulam. All these places have security camps.

Vankalai is a Christian village with Roman Catholics being more than 99 % and Protestant groups comprising the remainder. In earlier times the Muslim area of Erukkalampitty was the village with the largest population in Mannar district. With Muslims being driven away by the Liberation Tigers of Tamil Eelam (LTTE) in 1990 , Vankalai has become the largest now. Currently its population figure is a little over 8000. Vankalai and Pesalai are inhabited mainly by members of the Bharatha community. Vankalai is a blend of “Neithal” (fishing region) and “Marutham” ( agrarian lands). Apart from fisheries and farming there is also an educational and professional tradition. There are a number of teachers, government officials , clergymen and professionals from the area. Former TULF Parliamentarian of Mannar P. Soosaidasan is from Vankalai. Even now many top bureaucrats of the district hail from Vankalai.

The past years of ethnic strife have seen Vankalai also being affected like many other Tamil villages in the region. In 1985 the Catholic priest Fr. Mary Bastian a native of Vankalai himself and about twenty others were killed by the security forces. In later years a prominent school principal from Vankalai and some others were also killed and dumped in a well by security forces. There have also been many other minor incidents. The climate of terror compelled many residents of Vankalai to relocate to other places in the Island, cross over to India or go abroad to Western Countries.

The ceasefire that came into force from Feb 23rd 2002 gave the people a much needed respite from violence. Vankalai began flourishing . Many refugees from India began to return slowly. Life was blossoming again.

The victims of the Vankalai massacre were members of one such family that returned from India. The husband was 38 year old Sinnaiah Moorthy Martin. The wife was 27 year old Anthony Mary Madeleine. The daughter was 9 year old Anne Lakshika. The son was 7 year old Anne Dilakshan. The family had re – settled in Vankalai about a year and a half ago.

Martin was not a native of Vankalai. He was from Vidathal theevu. He had married Mary Madeleine and settled down in Vankalai. Madeleine also called Chitra was from Vankalai and had many close relatives. Both Children had been named Anne because the St. Annes Church in Vankalai was the family church. Martin was by profession a carpenter.

Several youths from Vankalai had joined the LTTE and other militant movements in the past. Several youths were tiger members even now. The elders of Vankalai had used this “connection” to extract a promise from the LTTE that they should not “camp” in the village or engage in any violent activity there. This was honoured by the LTTE for four years.

With the LTTE not engaging in any hostile action in the vicinity of Vankalai the security personnel also kept the peace. Apart from the Thallady base there was a camp and some security posts in Vankalai too. There was also a Police post. There was very little friction between the people and the security forces in Vankalai. This was the general situation in Mannar district too.

All this began to change after Mahinda Rajapakse became President. Relations between the Government of Sri Lanka (GOSL) and the LTTE began deteriorating. Soon the tigers commenced a “peoples war” . Members of the security forces were targeted . One consequence of this was the shattering of relative peace in Mannar. The landmining of a naval convoy in Pesalai saw the situation in Mannar changing drastically.

More personnel were deployed in the district and security intensified in Mannar. This tightening of security was felt in Vankalai too with security posts being set up in the junctions and even interior. Friction began increasing between the people and security personnel in Vankalai. The situation got aggravated with the induction of a fresh security personnel batch recently. According to Vankalai residents these security men were an uncouth, indisciplined lot. They reveled in uttering obscenities and engaging in indecent gestures. Their favourite target was the school girl population of Vankalai. One act was to exhibit condoms to the girls.

It was against this backdrop that the LTTE broke its pledge to the village elders and struck in the vicinity. On Thursday June 1st a claymore mine was set off on the border of Vankalai and adjacent Naruvilikkulam. A two wheel tractor was taking food to an army chekpost at Naruvilikkulam from Vankalai camp at about 7. 30 pm when the explosion was triggered. One soldier was killed and two injured.

Upon hearing of the landmine incident soldiers stationed at Vankalai camp began firing indiscriminately for nearly 20 minutes till they were brought under control. 42 year old Arulnesan and his 12 year old daughter Lorenzia were injured seriously and admitted later to the Muringan hospital.

The indiscriminate firing made the Vankalai people panic stricken.Initially most families fled Vankalai. They began returning in the next few days. Thereafter people began expecting massive military reprisals and started avoiding staying at home during night. They slept in churches during night. The Vankalai army  camp used to discharge a few rounds of fire regularly in the night.

The situation worsened further when the LTTE threw a grenade on an army patrol near the Eruvittan junction on the Naanaattan – Arippu road on Monday June 5th. There was an exchange of fire for about 10 minutes. One soldier was killed. Later soldiers began assaulting civilians in the area. This caused more insecurity among villages in the region including Vankalai.

The Martin – Madeleine family lived in the 10th ward precincts of Vankalai. Their housing scheme was named “Thomaspuri” or “Thomas township”. It was named after former Catholic Cardinal Thomas Cooray. The adjoining scheme was called “Bastipuri” This was  named after the slain priest Fr. Mary Bastian.

The people of Thomaspuri and Bastipuri went to St. Annes Church in the night for security. On Thursday 8th the elder sister of Chitra or Madeleine started out to Church. The younger sibling said that her husband had not returned yet and asked her “akka” to go on . She said she would follow with her family after the husband returned. The family never went to St. Annes.

On the following morning the elder sister returned and tried to find out why Chitras family had not turned up. There was no answer when she called out. Knocking on the door had no response. Fearing the worst people gathered at the house. The door was kicked open. What they saw horrified them.

Mary Madeleine was dead on the floor lying naked in a pool of blood. There were signs of her being sexually assaulted brutally. The bodies of Martin and the children were hanging inside the room. They had been tortured , beaten and hacked to death. Pieces of rope in the house were used to hang the bodies. The intestines of the boy were protruding. The areas around the girl’s vagina were crimson red with blood. It was feared that she too had been violated.

The carpentry tools of Martin like the “uli” or chisel had also been used to prick, cut and torture the victims. In addition heavier and sharper weapons like knives or bayonets too had been used to hack the victims. Some sado – masochistic persons with a bestial nature had been at work in the house. No firearms were used . The cold – blooded barbarity of a brutal nature defied description. Only people crazed with callous hatred or those whose senses had been distorted through narcotics could have inflicted such gruesome cruelty.

As news of the massacre spread people of Vankalai began gathering at Thomaspuri. They were sad and bitter. The youths in particular were in an angry mood. Their mindset reflected the overall agony and frustration of the Tamil people over an uneasy peace where innocent civilians were getting increasingly victimised. The climate of impunity under the Rajapakse regime was resulting in security personnel and their Tamil para- militaries getting away with murder and mayhem easily and effortlessly.

The preponderant opinion among Vankalai residents was that some security personnel were responsible for the massacre. Besides the general obnoxious conduct by the security men in Vankalai there was a more specific reason too for the suspicion. Apparently three soldiers had been in the neighbourhood on the 8th morning.

According to one woman they had shouted out to her at about 10. 30 am. When she came to the door they had asked her whether she knew Sinhala and whether she was living alone. She had replied in the negative and said her parents had gone to the market. They had asked her for her identity card. She went in and returned with her IC. But they had gone. She alleges that they were at the entrance of the Martin home. She had shut the door and waited inside.

It is suspected that the security personnel had “eyed” Mary Madeleine in the morning and returned later in the night. People of the area say they can identify the three. The reality is that even if the three are identified there is no proof to show they were responsible for the massacre.

Despite the lack of concrete evidence or unavailability of reliable eye- witnesses the people on the whole began pointing their finger at the security forces. When the Police and Army arrived an enraged crowd in its hundreds refused to let them proceed. People also began shouting slogans against the Vankalai army camp. Fearing a heavy breach of peace additional troops from Thalladdy and Riot Policemen were deployed in Vankalai.

An ugly situation was averted due to many members of the Catholic clergy and senior Government officials arriving at the scene. The Vicar – General for Mannar Rev, Fr, Xavier Crusz was himself from Vankalai. So too was the Mannar AGA Ms. Stanley de Mel. TNA Parliamentarian from Wanni district Vinothaharajalingam also arrived on the scene. The Mannar Bishop Joseph Rayappu also came to the scene of the massacre.

Thanks to the eforts of these persons the passions of the people were contained. Bishop Rayappu was visibly moved. When questioned by the BBC Tamil Service the Bishop said that people whose duty was to ensure the protection and security of the people were allegedly responsible for this violence.

Mannar additional magistrate TJ Prabakharan arrived on the scene and conducted preliminary inquiries. He ordered an autopsy of the bodies and recorded initial statements of some people. He directed that some pieces of evidence be sent for forensic analysis. Mr. Prabakharan scheduled a judicial inquiry and inquest for June 23rd. He ordered the Police to apprehend suspect sand conduct an identification parade on that day. He also directed the army and Police chief of the area to be present on the 23rd.

The bodies of the victims were released on Friday evening. They were kept at the Vankalai school for the public to pay their respects. On Saturday 10th the bodies were taken in procession to St. Annes Church for funeral mass. About 5000 people were in the funeral procession. The Bishop and Vicar – General of Mannar conducted the service with about 25 priests assisting. The four bodies were then taken to the Vankalai burial grounds and laid to rest in a single grave. One more Tamil family had been wiped out in a vicious campaign of violence.

Defence Ministry Spkesperson Brig. Prasad Samarasinghe when questioned by the media denied that the army was responsible. “The security forces have never done such a thing” he said. He said the tigers were responsible. Some newspapers quoting Police sources also said the LTTE was responsible. According to this version the victims were army informants. The LTTE had taken revenge in a brutal way due to this.

The cycle of violence continues in Sri Lanka. The violence committed by the LTTE is dutifully recorded and branded as terrorism by the authorities, media and International Community. The violence perpetrated by the state and its organs both official and unofficial are not condemned in equal manner. Unless the Sinhala people, responsible media sections and the International community realise that unadulterated state terror is being unleashed on innocent Tamil civilians by the Rajapakse regime no end seems to be in sight .

Meanwhile the wheels of justice would begin to grind slowly on June 23rd in the case of the Vankalai killings. With all due respect to the Mannar judiciary there seems to be absolutely no chance that justice would be done. From the Bindunuwewa massacre to this Vankalai violence the people responsible have got away and will get away. This is the past, present and future as far as the Tamil civilian victims are concerned.

si.title: වසර දහසයකට පෙර වන්කාලෙයි ප්‍රදේශයේ සිව් දෙනෙකුගෙන් යුත් පවුලක බිහිසුණු සංහාරයක්
body_lines: (මන්නාරම දිස්ත්‍රික්කයේ වයඹ - වන්කාලෙයි නගරයේ සිව් දෙනෙකුගෙන් යුත් පවුලක් 2006 ජූනි 8 වැනි දින අමානුෂික ලෙස සමූල ඝාතනය කරන ලදී. එම කුරිරු ක්‍රියාවට වගකිවයුත්තන් තවමත් නීතිය ඉදිරියට පැමිණ නැත. එම සිදුවීම ගැන විස්තරාත්මක ලිපියක් මා ශීර්ෂය යටතේ ලිවීය. 2006 ජූනි 13 වැනි දින “The Morning Leader” සඳහා වූ “Vicious Violence Wipes Out සිව් දෙනෙකුගෙන් යුත් පවුලක්”

ශ්‍රී ලංකාවේ සිදුවෙමින් පවතින වාර්ගික සහෝදර සංහාරය අවස්ථා කිහිපයකදී ම්ලේච්ඡ ප්‍රචණ්ඩත්වය දැක ඇත. පසුගිය බ්‍රහස්පතින්දා (2006 ජූනි 8) වයඹ ගම්මානයේ වයඹ ගම්මානයේ සිව් දෙනෙකුගෙන් යුත් පවුලක් ඝාතනය කිරීමේ දී පෙන්නුම් කරන ලද ම්ලේච්ඡත්වය සමහර විට එහි දරුණුතම තිරිසන්කම විය හැකිය. ම්ලේච්ඡයන් ලෙස පමණක් හැඳින්විය හැකි පුද්ගලයන් විසින් ඉතා කුරිරු ලෙස ඝාතනය කරන ලද වින්දිතයින් සිව්දෙනාගේ බිහිසුණු දසුනින් වඩාත් දැඩි වූ දෑස් පවා තෙත් වනු ඇත.

වින්දිතයින් හතර දෙනාගේ බිහිසුණු ග්‍රැෆික් ඡායාරූප දෙමළ මාධ්‍යවල විවිධ අංශවල ප්‍රදර්ශනය කර ඇත. පියා, දුව සහ පුතා එක් කාමරයක ගෙල වැලලාගෙන සිටි අතර මව තවත් කාමරයක බිම වැටී මියගොස් ඇත. හත් හැවිරිදි පිරිමි ළමයාගේ බඩවැල් ඉදිරියට නෙරා ඇති අයුරු දක්නට ලැබේ. විසිහත් හැවිරිදි මවගේ සහ නව හැවිරිදි දියණියගේ යෝනි ප්‍රදේශය අතිශයින් ලේ වැගිරී තිබිණි. ඝාතකයන් තිස් අට හැවිරිදි පියා ඇතුළු වින්දිතයින්ට දරුණු ලෙස වධ හිංසා පමුණුවා ඇති බව පෙනේ.

මෙම බිහිසුණු සංහාරය සිදුවූයේ මන්නාරමේ වයඹ දිස්ත්‍රික්කයේ වන්කලෙයි නම් ගම්මානයේය. වංකාලෙයි ප්‍රධාන ගොඩබිමේ උතුරින් වයඹ දෙසින් පිහිටා ඇත. එය තල්අඩි හමුදා කඳවුරේ සිට සැතපුම් හතරහමාරක් දුරින් පිහිටා ඇත. එය මන්නාරම නගරයට දකුණින් - නැගෙනහිරට සැතපුම් හයක් පමණ දුරින් පිහිටා ඇත.

මෑත කාලයේ වන්කලෙයි ජනතාව රාත්‍රිය උදාවන විට ශාන්ත ආනා දේවස්ථානවලට සහ වෙනත් දේවස්ථානවලට විශ්‍රාම ගියහ. ආරක්‍ෂක තත්ත්වය මත රාත්‍රියේදී නිවසේ සිටීම ආරක්‍ෂිත නොවීය. වින්දිත පවුලත් ඒ දේ කළා. බ්‍රහස්පතින්දා රාත්‍රියේ පවුල පල්ලියට නොපැමිණියේය. පසුදා උදෑසන ඥාතීන් සහ අසල්වාසීන් පරීක්ෂා කිරීමේදී මුළු පවුලම මියගොස් සිටිනු දැක තිබේ. වින්දිතයන් කපා කොටා, පහර දී, වධ දී එල්ලා තිබිණි. මව සහ දියණිය ලිංගික අපයෝජනයට ලක්ව ඇති බවක් පෙනෙන්නට තිබුණි.

ම්ලේච්ඡ සමූල ඝාතනයේ ප්‍රතිඵලය බොහෝ ආතතියකි. සත්‍ය ඝාතනය හෝ වධහිංසා පැමිණවීම සම්බන්ධයෙන් ඇසින් දුටු සාක්ෂිකරුවන් නැතත් වන්කාලෙයි ප්‍රදේශයේ ජනතාව ආරක්ෂක අංශ සාමාජිකයන් බවට සැකකරයි. රාජ්යය සහ එහි මාධ්ය ආරක්ෂක හමුදා වගකීම් ප්රතික්ෂේප කර ඇත. කොටි වගකිව යුතු බවට ප්‍රති චෝදනාවක් එල්ල වී තිබේ. මන්නාරමේ ඉන්න ටික දෙනෙක් ඒක විශ්වාස කරනවා. මන්නාරම කතෝලික රදගුරු ජෝසප් රායප්පු ප්‍රකාශ කර ඇත්තේ මෙම සමූල ඝාතනය පිටුපස ආරක්ෂාවට වගකිවයුත්තන් සිටි බවයි.

මිනිසුන් තම සෙසු මිනිසුන්ට විශේෂයෙන් කුඩා දරුවන්ට මෙවන් දුක්ඛිත ම්ලේච්ඡ ක්‍රියාවක් කරන්නේ කෙසේදැයි වටහා ගැනීම දුෂ්කර ය. සමහර පසුබිම් තොරතුරු අවම වශයෙන් මෙම දරුණු ප්‍රචණ්ඩත්වය ඇති වූ සන්දර්භය තේරුම් ගැනීමට උපකාරී වේ.

වංකාලෙයි යනු ධීවර සහ ගොවිතැන් කරන ගම්මානයකි. එය බටහිරින් මුහුද සහිත නානාත්තන් පාර දිගේ පිහිටා ඇත. ඓතිහාසික ශෛව ආගමික සිද්ධස්ථානය වන තිරුක්කේතීස්වරම් එහි උතුරු දෙසට වන්නට ඇත. Naanaattan එහි දකුණට තවත් පහළින් පිහිටා ඇත. නැගෙනහිර දෙසින් විශාලතම ගම්මානය උයිලන්කුලම් ය. මේ හැම තැනම ආරක්ෂක කඳවුරු තියෙනවා.

වන්කාලයි යනු ක්‍රිස්තියානි ගම්මානයක් වන අතර රෝමානු කතෝලිකයන් 99% කට වඩා වැඩි ප්‍රමාණයක් සහ රෙපරමාදු කණ්ඩායම් ඉතිරිව ඇත. මීට පෙර මන්නාරම දිස්ත්‍රික්කයේ වැඩිම ජනගහනයක් සිටි ගම්මානය වූයේ එරුක්කලම්පිටිය මුස්ලිම් ප්‍රදේශයයි. 1990 දී දෙමළ ඊළාම් විමුක්ති කොටි (එල්ටීටීඊ) විසින් මුස්ලිම්වරුන් පලවා හැරීමත් සමඟ වංකලෙයි දැන් විශාලතම බවට පත්ව ඇත. වර්තමානයේ එහි ජනගහන අගය 8000ට මදක් වැඩිය. වංකලෙයි සහ පේසාලේ ප්‍රධාන වශයෙන් භාරත ප්‍රජාවේ සාමාජිකයන් වාසය කරයි. වන්කලෙයි යනු "නයිතාල්" (ධීවර කලාපය) සහ "මරුතම්" (ගොවි බිම්) වල සම්මිශ්‍රණයකි. ධීවර හා ගොවිතැනට අමතරව අධ්‍යාපනික හා වෘත්තීය සම්ප්‍රදායක් ද ඇත. ප්‍රදේශයේ ගුරුවරුන්, රාජ්‍ය නිලධාරීන්, පූජ්‍යවරුන් සහ වෘත්තිකයන් ගණනාවක් සිටිති. TULF මන්නාරමේ හිටපු පාර්ලිමේන්තු මන්ත්‍රී පී. මේ වන විටත් දිස්ති‍්‍රක්කයේ ප‍්‍රධාන පෙළේ නිලධාරීහු බොහෝ දෙනෙක් වන්කාලෙයි ප‍්‍රදේශයෙන් පැමිණි අය වෙති.

පසුගිය වසරවල වාර්ගික ආරවුල් කලාපයේ අනෙකුත් බොහෝ දෙමළ ගම්මාන මෙන් වන්කාලෙයි ද බලපෑමට ලක්ව ඇත. 1985 දී කතෝලික පූජක පියතුමා. වන්කලෙයි ප්‍රදේශයේම උපන් මේරි බැස්ටියන් සහ තවත් විසි දෙනෙකු පමණ ආරක්ෂක අංශ විසින් ඝාතනය කරන ලදී. පසු කාලීනව වන්කාලෙයි ප්‍රදේශයේ ප්‍රකට පාසලක විදුහල්පතිවරයෙකු සහ තවත් කිහිප දෙනෙකු ද ආරක්ෂක අංශ විසින් ඝාතනය කර ළිඳකට දමා ඇත. තවත් සුළු සිදුවීම් රාශියක් ද සිදු වී ඇත. භීෂණ වාතාවරණය හේතුවෙන් වන්කාලෙයි ප්‍රදේශයේ පදිංචිකරුවන් බොහෝ දෙනෙකුට දිවයිනේ වෙනත් ස්ථානවලට යාමට, ඉන්දියාවට ගොස් බටහිර රටවලට පිටරට යාමට බල කෙරුනි.

2002 පෙබරවාරි 23 වැනි දින සිට බලාත්මක වූ සටන් විරාමය මගින් ජනතාවට ප්‍රචණ්ඩත්වයෙන් ඉතා අවශ්‍ය සහනයක් ලබා දුන්නේය. වන්කලෙයි සශ්‍රීක වීමට පටන් ගත්තේය. ඉන්දියාවෙන් පැමිණි බොහෝ සරණාගතයින් සෙමෙන් ආපසු යාමට පටන් ගත්හ. ජීවිතය නැවතත් මල් පිපෙන්නට විය.

වන්කාලෙයි සමූල ඝාතනයට ගොදුරු වූයේ ඉන්දියාවේ සිට පැමිණි එවැනි එක් පවුලක සාමාජිකයන්ය. සැමියා 38 හැවිරිදි සින්නයියා මූර්ති මාටින්ය. බිරිඳ 27 හැවිරිදි Anthony Mary Madeleine විය. දියණිය 9 හැවිරිදි ඈන් ලක්ෂිකා විය. පුතා 7 හැවිරිදි ඈන් දිලක්ෂන්ය. මෙම පවුල වසර එකහමාරකට පමණ පෙර වන්කාලෙයි ප්‍රදේශයේ නැවත පදිංචි වී ඇත.

මාටින් වංකාලේ උපන් කෙනෙක් නොවේ. ඔහු විදාතාල් තිව්වේ. ඔහු මේරි මැඩලීන් සමඟ විවාහ වී වන්කලෙයි හි පදිංචි විය. චිත්‍රා යනුවෙන් හඳුන්වනු ලබන මැඩලීන් වන්කලෙයි ප්‍රදේශයේ වූ අතර ඇයට සමීප ඥාතීන් රැසක්ද සිටියාය. වන්කලෙයි ශාන්ත ආනා දේවස්ථානය පවුලේ පල්ලිය වූ නිසා දරුවන් දෙදෙනාටම ඈන් යන නම තබා ඇත. මාටින් වෘත්තියෙන් වඩු කාර්මිකයෙකි.

වංකාලෙයි ප්‍රදේශයේ තරුණයින් කිහිප දෙනෙකු එල්.ටී.ටී.ඊ.යට සහ අනෙකුත් සටන්කාමී ව්‍යාපාරවලට පසුගිය කාලයේ සම්බන්ධ වී ඇත. තරුණයන් කිහිප දෙනෙක් මේ වන විටත් කොටි සාමාජිකයෝ වූහ. ගමේ “කඳවුරු නොගැසීමට” හෝ එහි කිසිදු ප්‍රචණ්ඩ ක්‍රියාවක නිරත නොවන බවට එල්.ටී.ටී.ඊ.යෙන් පොරොන්දුවක් ලබා ගැනීමට වන්කාලෙයි වැඩිහිටියන් මෙම “සම්බන්ධතාව” භාවිතා කර ඇත. මෙය එල්.ටී.ටී.ඊ.ය විසින් වසර හතරක් ගෞරවයට පාත්‍ර විය.

වන්කාලෙයි අවට ප්‍රදේශයේ එල්.ටී.ටී.ඊ. සංවිධානය කිසිදු සතුරු ක්‍රියාවක නිරත නොවීම නිසා ආරක්‍ෂක නිලධාරීන් ද සාමය ආරක්ෂා කළහ. තල්ලඩි කඳවුරට අමතරව වන්කාලෙයිහි කඳවුරක් සහ ආරක්ෂක මුරපොලවල් කිහිපයක් ද විය. පොලිස් මුරපොලකුත් තිබුණා. වන්කාලෙයි ප්‍රදේශයේ ජනතාව සහ ආරක්ෂක අංශ අතර ඇතිවූයේ ඉතා සුළු ගැටුමකි. මන්නාරම දිස්ත්‍රික්කයේ ද සාමාන්‍ය තත්ත්වය මෙය විය.

මේ සියල්ල වෙනස් වීමට පටන් ගත්තේ මහින්ද රාජපක්ෂ ජනාධිපති වූ පසුවය. ශ්‍රී ලංකා රජය (GOSL) සහ එල්ටීටීඊය අතර සබඳතා පිරිහීමට පටන් ගත්තේය. වැඩි කල් නොගොස් කොටි "ජනතා යුද්ධයක්" ආරම්භ කළහ. ආරක්ෂක අංශ සාමාජිකයින් ඉලක්ක කර ඇත. මෙහි එක් ප්‍රතිඵලයක් වූයේ මන්නාරමේ සාපේක්ෂ සාමය බිඳ වැටීමයි. පේසාලේ නාවික හමුදා රථ පෙළකට බිම් බෝම්බ දැමීම නිසා මන්නාරමේ තත්ත්වය විශාල ලෙස වෙනස් විය.

දිස්ත්‍රික්කයට වැඩි පිරිසක් යොදවා ඇති අතර මන්නාරමේ ආරක්ෂාව තර කර ඇත. හන්දිවල සහ අභ්‍යන්තරයේ පවා ආරක්‍ෂක මුරපොළවල් පිහිටුවා තිබීමත් සමඟ වංකාලෙයි ප්‍රදේශයටද මෙම ආරක්‍ෂාව දැඩි කිරීම දැනෙන්නට විය. වන්කාලෙයි ප්‍රදේශයේ ජනතාව සහ ආරක්ෂක නිලධාරීන් අතර ඝර්ෂණ එන්න එන්නම වැඩි විය. පසුගියදා නව ආරක්‍ෂක නිලධාරීන් කණ්ඩායමක් බඳවා ගැනීමත් සමඟ තත්ත්වය උග්‍ර විය. වන්කාලෙයි ප්‍රදේශවාසීන්ට අනුව මෙම ආරක්‍ෂක නිලධාරීන් නොසැලකිලිමත්, විනය විරෝධී පිරිසක්. ඔවුන් අසභ්‍ය වචන ප්‍රකාශ කිරීමෙන් සහ අශෝභන ඉරියව්වල නිරත වූහ. ඔවුන්ගේ ප්‍රියතම ඉලක්කය වූයේ වන්කාලේ පාසල් සිසුවියයි. එක් ක්‍රියාවක් වූයේ ගැහැණු ළමයින්ට කොන්ඩම් ප්‍රදර්ශනය කිරීමයි.

එල්.ටී.ටී.ඊ.ය ගමේ වැඩිහිටියන්ට දුන් පොරොන්දුව කඩකරමින් ඒ අවට ප්‍රහාරයක් එල්ල කළේ මෙවන් පසුබිමකය. ජුනි 01 බ්‍රහස්පතින්දා වන්කාලෙයි සහ යාබද නරුවිලික්කුලම් මායිමේ ක්ලේමෝ බෝම්බයක් අටවා ඇත. රාත්‍රී 7.30 ට පමණ වන්කලෙයි කඳවුරේ සිට නරුවිලික්කුලම් හමුදා මුරපොලකට රෝද දෙකේ ට්‍රැක්ටරයක් ​​ආහාර රැගෙන යමින් සිටියදී පිපිරුම ඇති විය. එක් සොල්දාදුවෙක් මිය ගිය අතර දෙදෙනෙකු තුවාල ලැබීය.

බිම් බෝම්බ සිද්ධිය සැලවීමත් සමඟ වන්කාලෙයි කඳවුරේ ස්ථානගතව සිටි සෙබළුන් ඔවුන් පාලනය කරන තෙක් විනාඩි 20කට ආසන්න කාලයක් ඉවක් බවක් නොමැතිව වෙඩි තැබීමට පටන් ගත්හ. 42 හැවිරිදි අරුල්නේසන් සහ ඔහුගේ 12 හැවිරිදි දියණිය ලොරෙන්සියා බරපතළ තුවාල ලබා පසුව මුරිංගන් රෝහලට ඇතුළත් කර ඇත.

අවිචාරවත් වෙඩි තැබීම වන්කලෙයි ජනතාව භීතියට පත් කළේය.මුලදී බොහෝ පවුල් වන්කලෙයි වලින් පලා ගියහ. ඊළඟ දින කිහිපය තුළ ඔවුන් ආපසු පැමිණීමට පටන් ගත්හ. ඉන්පසුව ජනතාව දැවැන්ත හමුදා පළිගැනීම් අපේක්ෂා කිරීමට පටන් ගත් අතර රාත්‍රියේදී නිවසේ රැඳී සිටීමෙන් වැළකී සිටීමට පටන් ගත්හ. ඔවුන් රාත්‍රියේදී පල්ලිවල නිදාගත්තා. වන්කාලෙයි හමුදා කඳවුරෙන් රාත්‍රී කාලයේ ගිනි වට කිහිපයක් පිට කිරීම පුරුද්දක් විය.

ජූනි 5 වැනි සඳුදා නානාඅත්තන් - අරිප්පු මාර්ගයේ එරුවිට්ටාන් හන්දිය අසලදී එල්.ටී.ටී.ඊ සංවිධානය විසින් හමුදා මුර සංචාරයක් වෙත අත්බෝම්බයක් ප්‍රහාරයක් එල්ල කිරීමත් සමඟ තත්ත්වය තවත් දරුණු විය. එහිදී විනාඩි 10ක පමණ කාලයක් වෙඩි හුවමාරුවක් සිදුවුණා. එක් සොල්දාදුවෙක් මිය ගියේය. පසුව සොල්දාදුවන් ප්‍රදේශයේ සිවිල් වැසියන්ට පහර දීමට පටන් ගත්හ. මෙමගින් වන්කාලෙයි ඇතුළු ප්‍රදේශයේ ගම්මානවල තවත් අනාරක්ෂිත බවක් ඇති විය.

මාටින් - මැඩලීන් පවුල ජීවත් වූයේ වන්කලෙයි 10 වැනි වාට්ටු පරිශ්‍රයේය. ඔවුන්ගේ නිවාස යෝජනා ක්‍රමය "තෝමස්පුරි" හෝ "තෝමස් ටවුන්ෂිප්" ලෙස නම් කරන ලදී. එය හිටපු කතෝලික කාදිනල් තෝමස් කුරේගේ නමින් නම් කරන ලදී. යාබද යෝජනා ක්‍රමය "බස්තිපුරි" ලෙස නම් කරන ලදී මෙය ඝාතනය කරන ලද පූජක පියතුමාගේ නමින් නම් කරන ලදී. මේරි බැස්ටියන්.

තෝමස්පුරි සහ බස්තිපුරි වැසියන් ආරක්‍ෂාව සඳහා රාත්‍රියේ ශාන්ත ආනා දේවස්ථානයට ගියහ. 8 බ්‍රහස්පතින්දා චිත්‍රා හෝ මැඩලීන්ගේ වැඩිමහල් සහෝදරිය පල්ලියට යාමට පටන් ගත්තාය. තම ස්වාමිපුරුෂයා තවමත් ආපසු නොපැමිණි බව පැවසූ බාල සොහොයුරිය "අක්කා" ට යන්නට කීවාය . ස්වාමිපුරුෂයා ආපසු පැමිණි පසු ඇය තම පවුලේ අය සමඟ පැමිණෙන බව ඇය පැවසුවාය. පවුලේ අය කවදාවත් ශාන්ත ආනාස් වෙත ගියේ නැත.

පහුවදා උදේ අක්කා ආපහු ඇවිත් චිත්‍රාස් පවුලේ අය නොපැමිණියේ මන්දැයි සොයා බැලුවාය. ඇය ඇමතූ විට පිළිතුරක් නොවීය. දොරට තට්ටු කළත් ප්‍රතිචාරයක් නැත. නරකම මිනිස්සු ගෙදරට එකතු වෙනවා කියලා බය වෙලා. දොරට පයින් ඇරියා. ඔවුන් දුටු දෙයින් ඔවුන් භීතියට පත් විය.

මේරි මැඩලීන් ලේ විලක් මැද නිරුවතින් බිම වැටී සිටියාය. ඇය අමානුෂික ලෙස ලිංගික හිංසනයට ලක් වූ බවට ලකුණු පහළ විය. මාටින්ගේ සහ දරුවන්ගේ සිරුරු කාමරය තුළ එල්ලෙමින් තිබුණි. ඔවුන්ට වධ හිංසා පමුණුවා, පහර දී කපා කොටා මරා දමා තිබුණි. සිරුරු එල්ලීමට යොදාගෙන තිබුණේ නිවසේ තිබූ ලණු කැබලිය. පිරිමි ළමයාගේ බඩවැල් ඉදිරියට නෙරා ගියේය. දැරියගේ යෝනි මාර්ගය අවට ප්‍රදේශ රුධිරයෙන් තද රතු පාට විය. ඇය ද උල්ලංඝනය වී ඇතැයි බිය විය.

මාටින්ගේ "උලි" හෝ චිසල් වැනි වඩු මෙවලම් වින්දිතයින්ට විදීමට, කැපීමට සහ වධ හිංසා කිරීමට ද භාවිතා කර ඇත. ඊට අමතරව පිහි හෝ බයිනෙත්තු වැනි බර හා තියුණු ආයුධ ද වින්දිතයන් කපා හැරීම සඳහා භාවිතා කර ඇත. තිරිසන් ස්වභාවයක් ඇති සමහර සාඩෝ - මැසොකිස්ටික් පුද්ගලයින් නිවසේ වැඩ කර ඇත. ගිනි අවි භාවිත කර නැත. ම්ලේච්ඡ ස්වභාවයේ සීතල - ලේ වැකි ම්ලේච්ඡත්වය ප්‍රතික්ෂේප කළ විස්තරය. මෙතරම් බිහිසුණු කුරිරුකම් කළ හැකිව තිබුණේ දැඩි වෛරයකින් උමතු වූ මිනිසුන්ට හෝ මත්ද්‍රව්‍ය මගින් ඉන්ද්‍රියයන් විකෘති කළ අයට පමණි.

සමූලඝාතනය පිළිබඳ ආරංචිය පැතිරීමත් සමඟ වන්කලෙයිහි ජනතාව තෝමස්පුරි වෙත එක්රැස් වීමට පටන් ගත්හ. ඔවුන් දුකෙන් හා කටුක විය. විශේෂයෙන්ම තරුණයන් සිටියේ කෝපයෙන්. අහිංසක සිවිල් වැසියන් වඩ වඩාත් ගොදුරු බවට පත්වෙමින් පවතින නොසන්සුන් සාමයක් සම්බන්ධයෙන් දෙමළ ජනයාගේ සමස්ත වේදනාව සහ කලකිරීම ඔවුන්ගේ මනෝභාවයෙන් පිළිබිඹු විය. රාජපක්ෂ පාලනය යටතේ දණ්ඩමුක්තියේ වාතාවරණය නිසා ආරක්ෂක නිලධාරීන් සහ ඔවුන්ගේ දෙමල පැරා මිලිටරි භටයන් මිනීමැරුම්වලින් සහ ව්‍යාකූලත්වයෙන් පහසුවෙන් සහ වෙහෙසකින් තොරව ගැලවීමට හේතු විය.

වන්කාලෙයි ප්‍රදේශවාසීන්ගේ ප්‍රමුඛ මතය වූයේ සමූල ඝාතනයට ඇතැම් ආරක්ෂක නිලධාරීන් වගකිව යුතු බවයි. වන්කාලෙයි ප්‍රදේශයේ ආරක්ෂක නිලධාරීන්ගේ සාමාන්‍ය පිළිකුල් සහගත හැසිරීමට අමතරව සැකය ඇතිවීමට වඩාත් නිශ්චිත හේතුවක් ද විය. පෙනෙන විදිහට, 8 වන දින උදෑසන සොල්දාදුවන් තිදෙනෙකු අසල්වැසි ප්‍රදේශයේ සිට ඇත.

එක් කාන්තාවක් පවසන පරිදි ඔවුන් උදේ 10. 30 ට පමණ ඇයට කෑගැසුවා. ඇය දොර ළඟට පැමිණි විට ඔවුන් ඇයගෙන් අසා ඇත්තේ ඇය සිංහල දන්නවාද ඇය තනියම ජීවත් වෙනවාද යන්නයි. ඇය නිෂේධාත්මකව පිළිතුරු දී ඇති අතර ඇගේ දෙමාපියන් වෙළඳපොළට ගොස් ඇති බව පැවසුවාය. ඔවුන් ඇගෙන් හැඳුනුම්පත ඉල්ලා තිබුණා. ඇය ඇතුළට ගොස් ඇගේ IC සමඟ ආපසු පැමිණියාය. නමුත් ඔවුන් ගිහින් තිබුණා. ඔවුන් මාටින්ගේ නිවසේ දොරටුව අසල සිටි බවට ඇය චෝදනා කරයි. ඇය දොර වසා ඇතුලට වී බලා සිටියාය.

ආරක්‍ෂක නිලධාරීන් මේරි මැඩලීන් උදේ “ඇස” දමා රාත්‍රියේ ආපසු පැමිණි බවට සැක කෙරේ. එම තිදෙනා හඳුනාගත හැකි බව ප්‍රදේශයේ ජනතාව පවසති. යථාර්ථය නම් ඔවුන් තිදෙනා හඳුනා ගත්තද සමූල ඝාතනයට වගකිවයුත්තන් බව පෙන්වීමට සාක්ෂි නොමැති වීමයි.

නිශ්චිත සාක්ෂි නොමැතිකම හෝ විශ්වාසදායක ඇසින් දුටු සාක්ෂිකරුවන් නොමැතිකම තිබියදීත්, සමස්තයක් වශයෙන් ජනතාව ආරක්ෂක අංශ වෙත ඇඟිල්ල දිගු කිරීමට පටන් ගත්හ. පොලිසිය සහ හමුදාව පැමිණෙන විට කෝපයට පත් සිය ගණනක් වූ පිරිසක් ඔවුන්ට ඉදිරියට යාමට ඉඩ දුන්නේ නැත. වන්කාලෙයි හමුදා කඳවුරට එරෙහිව ජනතාව සටන් පාඨ ද කෑ ගැසීමට පටන් ගත්හ. දැඩි සාමය කඩවෙතැයි බියෙන් තැල්ලඩි අතිරේක භට පිරිස් සහ කැරලි මර්දන පොලිස් භටයන් වන්කලෙයි වෙත යොදවන ලදී.

කතෝලික පූජකවරුන් සහ රජයේ ජ්‍යෙෂ්ඨ නිලධාරීන් රැසක් එම ස්ථානයට පැමිණීම හේතුවෙන් ඇති වූ කැත තත්ත්වයක් වැළකුණා. මන්නාරමේ විකාර් ජනරාල් පූජ්‍ය සේවියර් කෲස් පියතුමා වන්කාලේ සිට පැමිණි අයෙකි. මන්නාරම AGA ස්ටැන්ලි ද මෙල් මහත්මිය ද එසේ විය. දෙමළ ජාතික සන්ධානයේ වන්නි දිස්ත්‍රික් පාර්ලිමේන්තු මන්ත්‍රී විනෝතහාරාජලිංගම් ද එම ස්ථානයට පැමිණියා. මන්නාරම රදගුරු ජෝසප් රායප්පු මහතාද සමූල ඝාතනය සිදුවූ ස්ථානයට පැමිණියේය.

මේ අයගේ උත්සාහයට පින්සිද්ධ වෙන්න ජනතාවගේ ආශාවන් යටපත් වුණා. රායප්පු රදගුරුතුමා දෘෂ්‍යමානව සංවේගයට පත් විය. බීබීසී දෙමළ සේවය විසින් ප්‍රශ්න කළ විට රදගුරුවරයා කියා සිටියේ ජනතාවගේ ආරක්ෂාව සහ ආරක්ෂාව සහතික කිරීම තම යුතුකම වූ පුද්ගලයින් මෙම ප්‍රචණ්ඩත්වයට වගකිව යුතු යැයි කියනු ලබන බවයි.

මන්නාරම අතිරේක මහේස්ත්‍රාත් ටී.ජේ.ප්‍රභාකරන් මහතා එම ස්ථානයට පැමිණ මූලික පරීක්ෂණ පැවැත්වීය. ඔහු මළ සිරුරු පිළිබඳ මරණ පරීක්ෂණයක් පැවැත්වීමට නියෝග කළ අතර සමහර පුද්ගලයින්ගේ මූලික ප්‍රකාශ සටහන් කර ගත්තේය. ඇතැම් සාක්‍ෂි අධිකරණ වෛද්‍ය පරීක්‍ෂණය සඳහා යොමු කරන ලෙස ඔහු නියෝග කළේය. ප්‍රභාකරන් මහතා අධිකරණ පරීක්ෂණයක් හා මරණ පරීක්ෂණයක් ජුනි 23 වැනිදාට නියම කළේය. එදින හඳුනාගැනීමේ පෙරට්ටුවක් පවත්වන ලෙසට සැකකාර වැලි අත්අඩංගුවට ගන්නා ලෙස ඔහු පොලිසියට නියෝග කළේය. එමෙන්ම ප්‍රදේශයේ හමුදා සහ පොලිස් ප්‍රධානියාට ලබන 23 වනදා එහි පැමිණෙන ලෙස ද ඔහු දැනුම් දුන්නා.

මියගිය අයගේ සිරුරු සිකුරාදා සවස නිදහස් කරන ලදී. ඔවුන් මහජනතාවට ගෞරව දැක්වීම සඳහා වන්කලෙයි පාසලේ තබා ඇත. 10 සෙනසුරාදා දේහය අවමංගල්‍ය පූජාව සඳහා පෙරහැරින් ශාන්ත ආනා දේවස්ථානයට ගෙන යන ලදී. අවමංගල්‍ය පෙරහැරේ 5000ක් පමණ පිරිසක් පැමිණ සිටියහ. මන්නාරම රදගුරුතුමා සහ විකාර් ජනරාල්වරයා විසින් පූජකවරුන් 25 දෙනෙකුගේ පමණ සහාය ඇතිව දේව මෙහෙය පැවැත්වීය. අනතුරුව සිරුරු හතර වන්කාලෙයි සුසාන භූමියට ගෙන ගොස් එකම සොහොනක තැන්පත් කරන ලදී. තවත් එක් දෙමළ පවුලක් දරුණු ප්‍රචණ්ඩ ව්‍යාපාරයකින් අතුගා දමා තිබුණි.

ආරක්ෂක අමාත්‍යාංශයේ ප්‍රකාශක බ්‍රි. ප්‍රසාද් සමරසිංහගෙන් මාධ්‍යවේදීන් කළ ප්‍රශ්න කිරීම්වලදී හමුදාව වගකිව යුතු බව ප්‍රතික්ෂේප කළේය. “ආරක්ෂක අංශ කවදාවත් එවැනි දෙයක් කර නැහැ,” ඔහු පැවසීය. කොටි වගකිව යුතු බව ඔහු පැවසීය. පොලිස් ආරංචි මාර්ග උපුටා දක්වමින් ඇතැම් පුවත්පත් ද කියා සිටියේ එල්.ටී.ටී.ඊ. මෙම අනුවාදයට අනුව වින්දිතයින් හමුදා ඔත්තුකරුවන් ය. එල්.ටී.ටී.ඊ.ය මේ නිසා ම්ලේච්ඡ ආකාරයෙන් පළිගෙන තිබුණා.

ශ්‍රී ලංකාවේ ප්‍රචණ්ඩ චක්‍රය දිගටම පවතී. එල්ටීටීඊය විසින් සිදු කරන ලද ප්‍රචණ්ඩත්වය බලධාරීන්, මාධ්‍ය සහ ජාත්‍යන්තර ප්‍රජාව විසින් විධිමත් ලෙස සටහන් කර ත්‍රස්තවාදයක් ලෙස හංවඩු ගසයි. රාජ්‍යය සහ එහි ආයතන විසින් නිල සහ නිල නොවන යන දෙඅංශයෙන්ම සිදු කරන ප්‍රචණ්ඩත්වය සමාන ලෙස හෙළා නොදක්වයි. රාජපක්ෂ රෙජීමය විසින් අහිංසක දෙමළ සිවිල් වැසියන් මත අමු අමුවේ රාජ්‍ය භීෂණය මුදාහරින බව සිංහල ජනතාව, වගකිවයුතු මාධ්‍ය අංශ සහ ජාත්‍යන්තර ප්‍රජාව තේරුම් නොගන්නේ නම් එහි අවසානයක් පෙනෙන්නට තිබෙන බවක් නොපෙනේ.

මේ අතර ජූනි 23 වැනිදා වන්කාලෙයි ඝාතන සිද්ධියේදී යුක්තියේ රෝද ටික ටික ඇඹරෙන්න පටන් ගන්නවා. මන්නාරම අධිකරණයට තිබිය යුතු සියලු ගෞරවයෙන් යුක්තිය ඉටු වීමට කිසිසේත්ම ඉඩක් නොමැති බව පෙනේ. බිඳුණුවැව ඝාතනයේ සිට මේ වංකාලෙයි ප්‍රචණ්ඩත්වය දක්වා වගකිවයුත්තන් ගැලවී ගොස් ගැලවී යනු ඇත. දෙමළ සිවිල් වින්දිතයන් සම්බන්ධයෙන් ගත් කල, මෙය අතීතය, වර්තමානය සහ අනාගතයයි.

ta.title: பதினாறு வருடங்களுக்கு முன்னர் வான்காளையில் நால்வர் குடும்பம் ஒன்றின் கொடூரமான படுகொலை
body_lines: (2006 ஜூன் 8 ஆம் திகதி மன்னார் மாவட்டத்தின் வடமேற்கு வான்கலை நகரத்தில் நான்கு பேர் கொண்ட குடும்பம் ஒன்று கொடூரமான முறையில் படுகொலை செய்யப்பட்டது. இக்கொடூரச் செயலுக்கு காரணமானவர்கள் இன்னும் சட்டத்தின் முன் நிறுத்தப்படவில்லை. இச்சம்பவம் குறித்து விரிவாக கட்டுரை ஒன்றை எழுதியிருந்தேன். ஜூன் 13, 2006 அன்று "தி மார்னிங் லீடர்" க்காக "வன்கலையில் நான்கு பேர் கொண்ட குடும்பத்தை கொடூரமான வன்முறை அழிக்கிறது". அந்த கொடூரமான சம்பவத்தின் 16 வது ஆண்டு நிறைவைக் குறிக்கும் வகையில் எனது வலைப்பதிவில் கட்டுரையை மாற்றமின்றி மீண்டும் உருவாக்குகிறேன்- DBSJ)

இலங்கையில் நடந்து வரும் இன சகோதர படுகொலை பல சந்தர்ப்பங்களில் கொடூரமான வன்முறைகளைக் கண்டுள்ளது. கடந்த வியாழன் அன்று (ஜூன் 8, 2006) வடமேற்கு கிராமமான வான்கலையில் நான்கு பேர் கொண்ட குடும்பம் ஒன்று கொல்லப்பட்டதில் காட்டப்பட்ட காட்டுமிராண்டித்தனம் ஒருவேளை மிக மோசமான மிருகத்தனமாக இருக்கலாம். காட்டுமிராண்டிகள் என்று மட்டுமே வர்ணிக்கப்படக்கூடிய நபர்களால் மிகவும் கொடூரமாக கொல்லப்பட்ட நான்கு பாதிக்கப்பட்டவர்களின் பயங்கரமான பார்வையில் மிகவும் கடினமான கண்கள் கூட ஈரமாகியிருக்கும்.

பாதிக்கப்பட்ட நான்கு பேரின் கொடூரமான கிராஃபிக் புகைப்படங்கள் தமிழ் ஊடகங்களின் பல்வேறு பிரிவுகளில் காட்டப்பட்டுள்ளன. தந்தை, மகள் மற்றும் மகன் ஒரு அறையில் தூக்கில் தொங்கிய நிலையில், தாய் மற்றொரு அறையில் தரையில் இறந்து கிடந்தார். ஏழு வயது சிறுவனின் குடல்கள் நீண்டுகொண்டே காணப்படுகின்றன. இருபத்தி ஏழு வயதுடைய தாய் மற்றும் ஒன்பது வயது மகளின் பிறப்புறுப்பு மிகவும் இரத்தக்களரியாக இருந்தது. கொலையாளிகள் முப்பத்தெட்டு வயது தந்தை உட்பட பாதிக்கப்பட்டவர்களை கொடூரமாக சித்திரவதை செய்ததாக தெரிகிறது.

மன்னார் வடமேற்கு மாவட்டத்திலுள்ள வான்கலை என்ற கிராமத்தில் இந்த கொடூரமான படுகொலை இடம்பெற்றுள்ளது. வான்கலை பிரதான நிலப்பரப்பில் வடக்கிலிருந்து வடமேற்கில் அமைந்துள்ளது. இது தல்லாடி இராணுவத் தளத்திலிருந்து நான்கரை மைல் தொலைவில் உள்ளது.. மன்னார் நகருக்கு தெற்கே – கிழக்கே சுமார் ஆறு மைல் தொலைவில் உள்ளது.

சமீப காலங்களில் வான்கலை மக்கள் இரவு நேரத்தில் புனித அன்னாள் மற்றும் பிற தேவாலயங்களுக்கு ஓய்வு எடுத்து வருகின்றனர். பாதுகாப்பு சூழ்நிலை காரணமாக இரவில் வீட்டில் தங்குவது பாதுகாப்பாக இல்லை. பாதிக்கப்பட்ட குடும்பத்தினரும் அதைச் செய்து வந்தனர். வியாழன் இரவு குடும்பத்தினர் தேவாலயத்திற்கு வரவில்லை. மறுநாள் காலை உறவினர்கள் மற்றும் அக்கம்பக்கத்தினர் சோதனையிட்டபோது, ​​குடும்பத்தினர் அனைவரும் இறந்து கிடந்தனர். பாதிக்கப்பட்டவர்கள் வெட்டப்பட்டு, அடித்து, சித்திரவதை செய்யப்பட்டு தூக்கிலிடப்பட்டனர். தாயும் மகளும் பாலியல் வன்கொடுமை செய்யப்பட்டதாகத் தெரிகிறது.

இந்த கொடூர படுகொலை பெரும் பதற்றத்தை ஏற்படுத்தியுள்ளது. உண்மையான கொலை அல்லது சித்திரவதைக்கு நேரில் கண்ட சாட்சிகள் இல்லையென்றாலும் வான்காளை மக்கள் பாதுகாப்புப் படையைச் சேர்ந்தவர்கள் என சந்தேகிக்கின்றனர். அரசும் அதன் ஊடகங்களும் பாதுகாப்புப் படைப் பொறுப்பை மறுத்துள்ளன. புலிகள்தான் பொறுப்பு என்று எதிர்க் குற்றச்சாட்டு எழுந்துள்ளது. மன்னாரில் ஒரு சிலரே அதை நம்புகிறார்கள். இந்தப் படுகொலையின் பின்னணியில் பாதுகாப்பிற்குப் பொறுப்பானவர்களே இருப்பதாக மன்னார் கத்தோலிக்க ஆயர் ஜோசப் ராயப்பு தெரிவித்துள்ளார்.

மக்கள் தங்கள் சக மனிதர்கள் மீது குறிப்பாக சிறு குழந்தைகளுக்கு இத்தகைய கொடூரமான மிருகத்தனத்தை எவ்வாறு ஏற்படுத்துகிறார்கள் என்பதைப் புரிந்துகொள்வது கடினம். சில பின்னணி விவரங்கள் குறைந்தபட்சம் இந்த கொடூரமான வன்முறை நிகழ்ந்த சூழலைப் புரிந்துகொள்ள உதவும்.

வாங்கலை என்பது மீன்பிடி மற்றும் விவசாயம் செய்யும் கிராமமாகும். இது நானாட்டான் சாலையில் அதன் மேற்கில் கடலுடன் அமைந்துள்ளது. வரலாற்றுச் சிறப்புமிக்க சைவத் தலமான திருக்கேதீஸ்வரம் அதன் வடக்கே மேலும் உள்ளது. நானாட்டான் அதன் தெற்கே மேலும் கீழாக உள்ளது. கிழக்கு நோக்கிய மிகப்பெரிய கிராமம் உயிலங்குளம். இந்த இடங்களில் எல்லாம் பாதுகாப்பு முகாம்கள் உள்ளன.

வான்கலை ஒரு கிறிஸ்தவ கிராமமாகும், இதில் ரோமன் கத்தோலிக்கர்கள் 99% க்கும் அதிகமானவர்கள் மற்றும் புராட்டஸ்டன்ட் குழுக்கள் மீதமுள்ளவை. முற்காலத்தில் எருக்கலம்பிட்டி முஸ்லிம் பிரதேசம் மன்னார் மாவட்டத்தில் அதிக மக்கள் தொகை கொண்ட கிராமமாக இருந்தது. 1990 இல் தமிழீழ விடுதலைப் புலிகளால் முஸ்லிம்கள் விரட்டியடிக்கப்பட்ட நிலையில், தற்போது வான்காளை மிகப்பெரியதாக மாறியுள்ளது. தற்போது அதன் மக்கள்தொகை எண்ணிக்கை 8000 க்கும் சற்று அதிகமாக உள்ளது. வான்கலை மற்றும் பேசாலை முக்கியமாக பாரத சமூகத்தை சேர்ந்தவர்கள் வசிக்கின்றனர். வாங்கலை என்பது "நெய்தல்" (மீன்பிடி பகுதி) மற்றும் "மருதம்" (விவசாய நிலங்கள்) ஆகியவற்றின் கலவையாகும். மீன்பிடி மற்றும் விவசாயம் தவிர கல்வி மற்றும் தொழில் பாரம்பரியமும் உள்ளது. இப்பகுதியில் இருந்து ஏராளமான ஆசிரியர்கள், அரசு அதிகாரிகள், மதகுருமார்கள் மற்றும் தொழில் வல்லுநர்கள் உள்ளனர். மன்னார் முன்னாள் தமிழர் விடுதலைக் கூட்டணியின் நாடாளுமன்ற உறுப்பினர் பொ.சூசைதாசன் வான்காளையைச் சேர்ந்தவர். இப்போதும் மாவட்டத்தின் பல உயர்மட்ட அதிகாரிகள் வான்கலையில் இருந்து வந்தவர்கள்.

கடந்த வருடங்களில் இனக்கலவரம் இப்பகுதியில் உள்ள பல தமிழ் கிராமங்களைப் போலவே வாங்கலையும் பாதிக்கப்பட்டுள்ளது. 1985 இல் கத்தோலிக்க பாதிரியார் Fr. வான்கலையைச் சேர்ந்த மேரி பாஸ்டியனும் சுமார் இருபது பேரும் பாதுகாப்புப் படையினரால் கொல்லப்பட்டனர். பிற்காலத்தில் வான்கலையைச் சேர்ந்த பிரபல பாடசாலை அதிபர் ஒருவரும் இன்னும் சிலரும் பாதுகாப்புப் படையினரால் கொல்லப்பட்டு கிணற்றில் வீசப்பட்டனர். மேலும் பல சிறு சம்பவங்களும் நடந்துள்ளன. பயங்கரமான காலநிலை வான்கலையில் வசிப்பவர்கள் பலரை தீவின் மற்ற இடங்களுக்கு இடம்பெயர்வதற்கும், இந்தியாவைக் கடந்து அல்லது வெளிநாடுகளுக்கு மேற்கு நாடுகளுக்குச் செல்லவும் கட்டாயப்படுத்தியது.

பிப்ரவரி 23, 2002 முதல் அமலுக்கு வந்த போர்நிறுத்தம் வன்முறையில் இருந்து மக்களுக்கு மிகவும் தேவையான ஓய்வு கொடுத்தது. வாங்கலை செழிக்க ஆரம்பித்தது. இந்தியாவில் இருந்து வந்த பல அகதிகள் மெதுவாகத் திரும்பத் தொடங்கினர். வாழ்க்கை மீண்டும் மலர்ந்தது.

வான்கலை படுகொலையில் பாதிக்கப்பட்டவர்கள் இந்தியாவில் இருந்து திரும்பிய அத்தகைய குடும்பத்தைச் சேர்ந்தவர்கள். கணவர் 38 வயதான சின்னையா மூர்த்தி மார்ட்டின். மனைவி 27 வயதான அந்தோனி மேரி மேடலின். மகள் 9 வயது ஆனி லக்ஷிகா. மகன் 7 வயது ஆனி டிலக்ஷன். இந்தக் குடும்பம் ஒன்றரை வருடங்களுக்கு முன்னர் மீண்டும் வாங்கலையில் குடியேறியது.

மார்ட்டின் வாங்கலையை பூர்வீகமாக கொண்டவர் அல்ல. அவர் விடத்தல் தீவு. அவர் மேரி மேடலைனை திருமணம் செய்து கொண்டு வாங்கலையில் குடியேறினார். சித்ரா என்று அழைக்கப்படும் மேடலின் வாங்கலையைச் சேர்ந்தவர் மற்றும் பல நெருங்கிய உறவினர்களைக் கொண்டிருந்தார். வாங்கலையில் உள்ள புனித அன்னாள் தேவாலயம் குடும்ப தேவாலயமாக இருந்ததால் இரண்டு குழந்தைகளுக்கும் ஆனி என்று பெயரிடப்பட்டது. மார்ட்டின் தொழிலில் தச்சராக இருந்தார்.

வான்கலையைச் சேர்ந்த பல இளைஞர்கள் கடந்த காலங்களில் விடுதலைப் புலிகள் மற்றும் ஏனைய போராளி இயக்கங்களில் இணைந்து கொண்டனர். பல இளைஞர்கள் இப்போதும் புலி உறுப்பினர்களாக இருந்தனர். வான்கலைப் பெரியவர்கள் இந்த “இணைப்பை” பயன்படுத்தி, அவர்கள் கிராமத்தில் “முகாமில்” அல்லது வன்முறைச் செயலில் ஈடுபடக் கூடாது என்ற வாக்குறுதியை புலிகளிடம் இருந்து பெற்றுக் கொண்டனர். நான்கு வருடங்களாக விடுதலைப் புலிகளால் இது கௌரவிக்கப்பட்டது.

வான்கலைப் பிரதேசத்தில் விடுதலைப் புலிகள் எந்தவித விரோத நடவடிக்கையிலும் ஈடுபடாத நிலையில் பாதுகாப்பு படையினரும் அமைதி காத்தனர். தள்ளடி தளத்தைத் தவிர வாங்கலையிலும் ஒரு முகாம் மற்றும் சில பாதுகாப்பு நிலைகள் இருந்தன. காவல் நிலையமும் இருந்தது. வான்கலையில் மக்களுக்கும் பாதுகாப்புப் படையினருக்கும் இடையில் மிகக் குறைவான உரசல்கள் ஏற்பட்டன. மன்னார் மாவட்டத்திலும் இதுவே பொதுவான நிலை.

மஹிந்த ராஜபக்ஷ ஜனாதிபதியாக பதவியேற்ற பின்னர் இவை அனைத்தும் மாற ஆரம்பித்தன. இலங்கை அரசுக்கும் (GOSL) விடுதலைப் புலிகளுக்கும் இடையிலான உறவுகள் மோசமடையத் தொடங்கின. விரைவில் புலிகள் "மக்கள் போரை" தொடங்கினர். பாதுகாப்புப் படையைச் சேர்ந்தவர்கள் குறிவைக்கப்பட்டனர். இதன் ஒரு விளைவுதான் மன்னாரில் ஓரளவு அமைதி குலைந்தது. பேசாலையில் கடற்படைத் தொடரணியின் கண்ணிவெடி மன்னாரின் நிலைமையை வெகுவாக மாற்றியமைத்தது.

மாவட்டத்தில் அதிகளவிலான ஆளணிகள் குவிக்கப்பட்டு மன்னாரில் பாதுகாப்பு தீவிரப்படுத்தப்பட்டுள்ளது. சந்திகளிலும் உட்புறங்களிலும் கூட பாதுகாப்பு நிலைகள் அமைக்கப்பட்டுள்ளதால் வான்கலையில் இந்த பாதுகாப்பு இறுக்கம் உணரப்பட்டது. வான்கலையில் மக்களுக்கும் பாதுகாப்பு அதிகாரிகளுக்கும் இடையில் உரசல் அதிகரிக்க ஆரம்பித்தது. சமீபத்தில் ஒரு புதிய பாதுகாப்புப் பணியாளர்கள் சேர்க்கப்பட்டதன் மூலம் நிலைமை மோசமடைந்தது. வாங்கலை வாசிகளின் கூற்றுப்படி, இந்த பாதுகாப்பு ஆட்கள் ஒரு அநாகரிகமான, ஒழுக்கம் இல்லாதவர்கள். அநாகரீகமான பேச்சுக்களிலும், அநாகரீகமான சைகைகளிலும் ஈடுபட்டு மகிழ்ந்தனர். அவர்களின் விருப்பமான இலக்கு வான்கலையின் பாடசாலை மாணவிகள். சிறுமிகளுக்கு ஆணுறைகளை காட்சிப்படுத்துவது ஒரு செயல்.

இந்தப் பின்னணியில்தான் புலிகள் கிராமப் பெரியவர்களிடம் கொடுத்த உறுதிமொழியை மீறி அக்கம்பக்கத்தில் தாக்குதல் நடத்தினர். ஜூன் 1ஆம் திகதி வியாழன் அன்று வான்கலை மற்றும் அதனை அண்டிய நருவிலிக்குளத்தின் எல்லையில் கிளைமோர் கண்ணி வெடிக்கப்பட்டது. இரவு 7.30 மணியளவில் வான்கலை முகாமில் இருந்து நருவிலிக்குளத்திலுள்ள இராணுவ சோதனைச் சாவடிக்கு இரு சக்கர உழவு இயந்திரம் உணவு எடுத்துச் சென்ற போது வெடிப்பு ஏற்பட்டது. இதில் ஒரு ராணுவ வீரர் உயிரிழந்தார், இருவர் காயமடைந்தனர்.

கண்ணிவெடிச் சம்பவத்தைக் கேள்வியுற்ற வான்கலை முகாமில் நிலைகொண்டிருந்த படையினர் 20 நிமிடங்களுக்குள் கண்மூடித்தனமாகச் சுடத் தொடங்கினர். 42 வயதான அருள்நேசன் மற்றும் அவரது 12 வயது மகள் லோரன்சியா ஆகியோர் படுகாயமடைந்து முரிங்கன் வைத்தியசாலையில் அனுமதிக்கப்பட்டுள்ளனர்.

கண்மூடித்தனமான துப்பாக்கிச் சூடு வான்காளை மக்களை பீதிக்குள்ளாக்கியது.ஆரம்பத்தில் பெரும்பாலான குடும்பங்கள் வாங்கலையை விட்டு வெளியேறினர். அடுத்த சில நாட்களில் திரும்பி வரத் தொடங்கினர். அதன்பிறகு மக்கள் பாரிய இராணுவ பழிவாங்கல்களை எதிர்பார்க்கத் தொடங்கினர் மற்றும் இரவில் வீட்டில் தங்குவதைத் தவிர்க்கத் தொடங்கினர். இரவில் தேவாலயங்களில் தூங்கினர். வான்கலை இராணுவ முகாமில் இரவு நேரங்களில் அடிக்கடி சில சுற்றுகள் தீ மூட்டப்பட்டது.

ஜூன் 5 ஆம் திகதி திங்கட்கிழமை நானாட்டான் - அரிப்பு வீதியில் எருவிட்டான் சந்திக்கு அருகில் ரோந்துப் பணியில் ஈடுபட்டிருந்த இராணுவத்தினர் மீது விடுதலைப் புலிகள் கைக்குண்டு வீசியதால் நிலைமை மேலும் மோசமடைந்தது. சுமார் 10 நிமிடம் துப்பாக்கிச் சண்டை நடந்தது. ஒரு ராணுவ வீரர் கொல்லப்பட்டார். பின்னர் அப்பகுதியில் உள்ள பொதுமக்கள் மீது ராணுவத்தினர் தாக்குதல் நடத்தத் தொடங்கினர். இதனால் வான்கலை உள்ளிட்ட பிரதேச கிராமங்களில் மேலும் பாதுகாப்பின்மை ஏற்பட்டது.

வாங்கலை 10வது வார்டுக்கு உட்பட்ட பகுதியில் மார்ட்டின் - மேடலின் குடும்பத்தினர் வசித்து வந்தனர். அவர்களின் வீட்டுத் திட்டத்திற்கு "தாமஸ்புரி" அல்லது "தாமஸ் டவுன்ஷிப்" என்று பெயரிடப்பட்டது. இது முன்னாள் கத்தோலிக்க கர்தினால் தாமஸ் குரேயின் நினைவாக பெயரிடப்பட்டது. அருகிலுள்ள திட்டம் "பஸ்திபுரி" என்று அழைக்கப்பட்டது, இது கொல்லப்பட்ட பாதிரியார் Fr. மேரி பாஸ்டியன்.

தாமஸ்புரி மற்றும் பஸ்திபுரி மக்கள் பாதுகாப்புக்காக செயின்ட் ஆன்ஸ் தேவாலயத்திற்கு இரவில் சென்றனர். வியாழன் 8 ஆம் தேதி சித்ரா அல்லது மேடலின் மூத்த சகோதரி தேவாலயத்திற்குச் சென்றார். தன் கணவர் இன்னும் திரும்பி வரவில்லை என்று சொன்ன இளைய சகோதரி, “அக்கா”விடம் போகச் சொன்னார் . கணவன் திரும்பி வந்த பிறகு தன் குடும்பத்துடன் பின்தொடர்வதாக அவள் சொன்னாள். குடும்பம் செயின்ட் ஆன்ஸ் சென்றதில்லை.

மறுநாள் காலையில் மூத்த சகோதரி திரும்பி வந்து சித்ராஸ் குடும்பம் ஏன் வரவில்லை என்று கண்டுபிடிக்க முயன்றார். அவள் கூப்பிட்டபோது பதில் இல்லை. கதவைத் தட்டியும் பதில் இல்லை. மோசமான மக்கள் வீட்டில் கூடிவிட்டார்கள் என்று பயந்து. கதவு உதைக்கப்பட்டது. அவர்கள் பார்த்தது அவர்களை பயமுறுத்தியது.

மேரி மேடலின் ரத்த வெள்ளத்தில் நிர்வாணமாக தரையில் இறந்து கிடந்தார். அவள் கொடூரமாக பாலியல் வன்கொடுமை செய்யப்பட்டதற்கான அறிகுறிகள் இருந்தன. அறைக்குள் மார்ட்டின் மற்றும் குழந்தைகளின் உடல்கள் தொங்கிக் கொண்டிருந்தன. அவர்கள் சித்திரவதை செய்யப்பட்டு, தாக்கப்பட்டு, வெட்டிக் கொல்லப்பட்டனர். சடலங்களைத் தொங்கவிட வீட்டில் இருந்த கயிறு துண்டுகள் பயன்படுத்தப்பட்டன. சிறுவனின் குடல்கள் நீண்டுகொண்டிருந்தன. சிறுமியின் பிறப்புறுப்பைச் சுற்றியுள்ள பகுதிகள் இரத்தத்தால் சிவப்பு நிறத்தில் இருந்தன. அவளும் மீறப்பட்டு விட்டாளோ என்று அஞ்சியது.

மார்ட்டினின் தச்சுக் கருவிகளான "உளி" அல்லது உளி பாதிக்கப்பட்டவர்களை குத்தவும், வெட்டவும் மற்றும் சித்திரவதை செய்யவும் பயன்படுத்தப்பட்டது. கூடுதலாக, கத்திகள் அல்லது பயோனெட்டுகள் போன்ற கனமான மற்றும் கூர்மையான ஆயுதங்கள் பாதிக்கப்பட்டவர்களை வெட்டுவதற்கு பயன்படுத்தப்பட்டன. மிருகத்தனமான சுபாவம் கொண்ட சில சாடோ - மஸோகிஸ்டிக் நபர்கள் வீட்டில் வேலை செய்து கொண்டிருந்தனர். துப்பாக்கிகள் எதுவும் பயன்படுத்தப்படவில்லை. ஒரு மிருகத்தனமான இயற்கையின் குளிர் - இரத்தம் தோய்ந்த காட்டுமிராண்டித்தனம் விளக்கத்தை மீறியது. கடுமையான வெறுப்பில் வெறிபிடித்தவர்கள் அல்லது போதைப்பொருள் மூலம் புலன்கள் சிதைக்கப்பட்டவர்கள் மட்டுமே இத்தகைய கொடூரமான கொடுமையை இழைத்திருக்க முடியும்.

படுகொலை செய்தி பரவியதும் வான்கலை மக்கள் தாமஸ்புரியில் திரண்டனர். அவர்கள் சோகமாகவும் கசப்பாகவும் இருந்தனர். குறிப்பாக இளைஞர்கள் கோபமான மனநிலையில் இருந்தனர். அவர்களின் மனநிலையானது தமிழ் மக்களின் ஒட்டுமொத்த வேதனையையும் விரக்தியையும் பிரதிபலித்தது, அங்கு அப்பாவி பொதுமக்கள் அதிகளவில் பாதிக்கப்படுகின்றனர். இராஜபக்ஷ ஆட்சியின் கீழ் இருந்த தண்டனையிலிருந்து விடுபடாத சூழல், பாதுகாப்புப் பணியாளர்கள் மற்றும் அவர்களது தமிழ் துணை ராணுவத்தினர் கொலை மற்றும் கலவரத்தில் இருந்து எளிதாகவும் சிரமமின்றி தப்பிக்க வழிவகுத்தது.

இந்த படுகொலைக்கு சில பாதுகாப்பு உத்தியோகத்தர்களே காரணம் என்பது வாங்கலை பிரதேசவாசிகள் மத்தியில் முன்வைக்கப்பட்ட கருத்து. வான்கலையில் பாதுகாப்புப் படையினரின் பொதுவான அருவருப்பான நடத்தையைத் தவிர, சந்தேகத்திற்கு ஒரு குறிப்பிட்ட காரணமும் இருந்தது. 8ஆம் தேதி காலை மூன்று ராணுவ வீரர்கள் அக்கம் பக்கத்தில் இருந்ததாக தெரிகிறது.

ஒரு பெண்ணின் கூற்றுப்படி, அவர்கள் காலை 10. 30 மணியளவில் அவளிடம் கூச்சலிட்டனர். அவள் வாசலுக்கு வந்ததும் சிங்களம் தெரியுமா, தனியாக வாழ்கிறாளா என்று கேட்டனர். அவள் எதிர்மறையாக பதிலளித்தாள், அவளுடைய பெற்றோர் சந்தைக்கு சென்றுவிட்டதாகக் கூறினார். அவளிடம் அடையாள அட்டை கேட்டனர். உள்ளே சென்று ஐசியுடன் திரும்பினாள். ஆனால் அவர்கள் போயிருந்தார்கள். அவர்கள் மார்ட்டின் வீட்டு வாசலில் இருந்ததாக அவள் குற்றம் சாட்டினாள். கதவை சாத்திவிட்டு உள்ளே காத்திருந்தாள்.

பாதுகாப்புப் பணியாளர்கள் மேரி மேடலைனை காலையில் "கண்களை" பார்த்துவிட்டு இரவில் திரும்பி வந்ததாக சந்தேகிக்கப்படுகிறது. மூவரையும் அடையாளம் காண முடியும் என அப்பகுதி மக்கள் தெரிவிக்கின்றனர். உண்மை என்னவென்றால், அவர்கள் மூவரையும் அடையாளம் கண்டாலும், அவர்கள் படுகொலைக்கு காரணமானவர்கள் என்பதைக் காட்ட எந்த ஆதாரமும் இல்லை.

உறுதியான ஆதாரங்கள் இல்லாவிட்டாலும் அல்லது நம்பத்தகுந்த சாட்சிகள் கிடைக்காவிட்டாலும், ஒட்டுமொத்த மக்கள் பாதுகாப்புப் படையினரை நோக்கி விரல் நீட்டினர். பொலிஸாரும் இராணுவத்தினரும் வந்தபோது ஆத்திரமடைந்த நூற்றுக்கணக்கான மக்கள் அவர்களைத் தொடர அனுமதிக்க மறுத்தனர். வான்கலை இராணுவ முகாமிற்கு எதிராகவும் மக்கள் கோஷங்களை எழுப்ப ஆரம்பித்தனர். அமைதிக்கு இடையூறு ஏற்படக்கூடும் என்ற அச்சத்தில் தள்ளாடியில் இருந்து கூடுதல் படையினரும், கலகத் தடுப்புப் பொலிஸாரும் வாங்கலையில் குவிக்கப்பட்டனர்.

சம்பவ இடத்திற்கு கத்தோலிக்க மதகுருமார்கள் மற்றும் மூத்த அரசாங்க அதிகாரிகள் பலர் வந்ததால் அசம்பாவிதம் தவிர்க்கப்பட்டது. மன்னாருக்கான விகாரி ஜெனரல், அருட்தந்தை, சேவியர் குரூஸ் அவர்களே வாங்கலையைச் சேர்ந்தவர். மன்னார் AGA திருமதி Stanley de Mel அவர்களும் அவ்வாறே இருந்தார். வன்னி மாவட்ட தமிழ் தேசியக் கூட்டமைப்பின் நாடாளுமன்ற உறுப்பினர் வினோதஹாராஜலிங்கமும் சம்பவ இடத்திற்கு வருகை தந்தார். மன்னார் ஆயர் ஜோசப் ராயப்புவும் படுகொலை நடந்த இடத்திற்கு வந்தார்.

இந்த நபர்களின் முயற்சியால் மக்களின் உணர்வுகள் அடக்கப்பட்டன. பிஷப் ராயப்பு கண்கூடாக நெகிழ்ந்தார். பிபிசி தமிழ்ச் சேவையிடம் வினவியபோது, ​​மக்களின் பாதுகாப்பு மற்றும் பாதுகாப்பை உறுதி செய்வதை கடமையாகக் கொண்டவர்கள் இந்த வன்முறைக்குக் காரணமானவர்கள் எனக் கூறப்படுவதாக பிஷப் தெரிவித்தார்.

மன்னார் மேலதிக நீதவான் டி.ஜே.பிரபாகரன் சம்பவ இடத்திற்கு வந்து முதற்கட்ட விசாரணைகளை மேற்கொண்டார். அவர் உடல்களை பிரேத பரிசோதனை செய்ய உத்தரவிட்டார் மற்றும் சிலரின் ஆரம்ப அறிக்கைகளை பதிவு செய்தார். சில ஆதாரங்களை தடயவியல் ஆய்வுக்கு அனுப்புமாறு அவர் உத்தரவிட்டார். திரு. பிரபாகரன் ஜூன் 23 அன்று நீதி விசாரணை மற்றும் விசாரணையை திட்டமிட்டார். அன்றைய தினம் அடையாள அணிவகுப்பு நடத்தி சந்தேகத்திற்கிடமான மணலை கைது செய்ய காவல்துறைக்கு உத்தரவிட்டார். அத்துடன் குறித்த பிரதேசத்தின் இராணுவம் மற்றும் பொலிஸ்மா அதிபரையும் எதிர்வரும் 23ஆம் திகதி முன்னிலையாகுமாறு பணிப்புரை விடுத்துள்ளார்.

உயிரிழந்தவர்களின் உடல்கள் வெள்ளிக்கிழமை மாலை விடுவிக்கப்பட்டன. பொதுமக்களின் அஞ்சலிக்காக வான்கலை பாடசாலையில் தங்க வைக்கப்பட்டனர். சனிக்கிழமை 10 ஆம் தேதி உடல்கள் இறுதி ஊர்வலமாக புனித அன்னீஸ் தேவாலயத்திற்கு எடுத்துச் செல்லப்பட்டன. இறுதி ஊர்வலத்தில் சுமார் 5000 பேர் இருந்தனர். மன்னார் ஆயர் மற்றும் விகார் ஜெனரல் சுமார் 25 பாதிரியார்களின் உதவியுடன் வழிபாடு நடத்தினார். பின்னர் நான்கு சடலங்களும் வான்கலை மயானத்திற்கு கொண்டு செல்லப்பட்டு ஒரே கல்லறையில் அடக்கம் செய்யப்பட்டது. மேலும் ஒரு தமிழ் குடும்பம் வன்முறையின் கொடூரமான பிரச்சாரத்தில் அழிக்கப்பட்டது.

பாதுகாப்பு அமைச்சின் செய்தித் தொடர்பாளர் பிரிஜி. பிரசாத் சமரசிங்கவிடம் ஊடகவியலாளர்கள் வினவிய போது இராணுவம் பொறுப்பேற்கவில்லை என மறுத்தார். "பாதுகாப்புப் படையினர் இதுபோன்ற ஒரு செயலைச் செய்ததில்லை" என்று அவர் கூறினார். புலிகளே பொறுப்பு என்றார். பொலிஸ் வட்டாரங்களை மேற்கோள்காட்டி சில பத்திரிகைகள் விடுதலைப் புலிகளே பொறுப்பாளிகள் என்றும் கூறியுள்ளன. இந்த பதிப்பின் படி, பாதிக்கப்பட்டவர்கள் இராணுவ தகவலறிந்தவர்கள். இதன் காரணமாக புலிகள் கொடூரமான முறையில் பழிவாங்கியுள்ளனர்.

இலங்கையில் வன்முறைச் சுழற்சி தொடர்கிறது. எல்.ரீ.ரீ.ஈ செய்த வன்முறைகள் அதிகாரிகள், ஊடகங்கள் மற்றும் சர்வதேச சமூகத்தால் கடமையாக பதிவு செய்யப்பட்டு பயங்கரவாதமாக முத்திரை குத்தப்படுகிறது. அரசு மற்றும் அதன் உறுப்புகள் உத்தியோகபூர்வ மற்றும் உத்தியோகபூர்வமற்ற முறையில் நடத்தப்படும் வன்முறைகள் சமமான முறையில் கண்டிக்கப்படவில்லை. இராஜபக்ஷ ஆட்சியினால் அப்பாவி தமிழ் மக்கள் மீது கலப்படமற்ற அரச பயங்கரவாதம் கட்டவிழ்த்து விடப்படுகிறது என்பதை சிங்கள மக்களும், பொறுப்புள்ள ஊடகப் பிரிவுகளும், சர்வதேச சமூகமும் உணராத வரையில், எந்த முடிவும் எட்டிப் பார்ப்பதாகத் தெரியவில்லை.

இதற்கிடையில், ஜூன் 23-ம் தேதி வான்காளை படுகொலை வழக்கில் நீதியின் சக்கரங்கள் மெதுவாக அரைக்கத் தொடங்கும். மன்னார் நீதித்துறைக்கு உரிய மரியாதையுடன் நீதி வழங்கப்படுவதற்கான வாய்ப்புகள் இல்லை என்றே தோன்றுகிறது. பிந்துனுவெவ படுகொலையில் இருந்து இந்த வான்கலை வன்முறை வரை பொறுப்பானவர்கள் தப்பித்துவிட்டார்கள், தப்பிப்பார்கள். பாதிக்கப்பட்ட தமிழ் சிவிலியன்களைப் பொறுத்த வரை இதுதான் கடந்த காலம், நிகழ்காலம், எதிர்காலம்.

en.title: Terrible Massacre of a Four Member  Family in Vankaalai   Sixteen  Years Ago
body_lines: (A family of four in the North – western town of Vankalai in Mannar district was brutally massacred on June 8th 2006. The persons responsible for the cruel act are yet to be brought to justice. I wrote a detailed article about the incident under the heading ”Vicious Violence Wipes Out family of four in Vankalai” for “The Morning Leader” of June 13th 2006. I am reproducing the article without changes on my blog to denote the 16th  anniversary of the horrible incident- DBSJ)

The on going ethnic fratricide in Sri Lanka has seen brutal violence on several occasions. The savagery shown in the slaying of a family of four in the North – Western village of Vankalai last Thursday (June 8th 2006) was perhaps bestiality at its worst. Even the most hardened eyes would have turned moist at the terrible sight of the four victims killed so cruelly by persons who can only be described as barbarians.

Gruesomely graphic photographs of the four victims have been displayed in various sections of the Tamil media. The father, daughter and son were hanging dead in one room while the mother was dead on the floor in another room. The intestines of the seven year old boy are seen protruding. The vaginal area of the twenty – seven year old mother and nine year old daughter were extremely bloody. It appears that the killers have sadistically tortured their victims including the thirty – eight year old father.

The scene of this terrible massacre was in a village called Vankalai in the North – Western district of Mannar. Vankalai is situated north by north – west on the mainland . It is four and a half miles away from Thallaadi military base.. It is about six miles to the South – East of Mannar town.

In recent times the people of Vankalai had been retiring to the St. Annes and other churches during nightfall. Staying at home during night was not safe due to the security situation. The victimised family too used to do that. The family had been absent from Church on Thursday night. When relatives and neighbours checked on the following morning they found the entire family dead. The victims had been hacked, beaten, tortured and hung. The mother and daughter seemed to have been violated sexually.

The brutal massacre has resulted in much tension. Though there are no eyewitnesses to the actual killing or torture the people of Vankalai suspect members of the security forces as being responsible. The state and its media have denied security force responsibilty . There has been a counter charge that the tigers were responsible. Few people in Mannar believe that. The Catholic Bishop of Mannar Joseph Rayappu has stated that those responsible for security were behind the massacre.

It is difficult to understand how people could inflict such sadistic brutality on their fellow human beings particularly little children.Some background details may help in understanding at least the context in which this vicious violence occurred.

Vankalai is a pre- dominantly fishing cum farming village. It lies along the Naanaattan road with the sea to its west. The historic Saivaite shrine Thirukketheeeswaram is further up to its North. Naanaattan is further down to its south. Towards the east the biggest village is Uyilankulam. All these places have security camps.

Vankalai is a Christian village with Roman Catholics being more than 99 % and Protestant groups comprising the remainder. In earlier times the Muslim area of Erukkalampitty was the village with the largest population in Mannar district. With Muslims being driven away by the Liberation Tigers of Tamil Eelam (LTTE) in 1990 , Vankalai has become the largest now. Currently its population figure is a little over 8000. Vankalai and Pesalai are inhabited mainly by members of the Bharatha community. Vankalai is a blend of “Neithal” (fishing region) and “Marutham” ( agrarian lands). Apart from fisheries and farming there is also an educational and professional tradition. There are a number of teachers, government officials , clergymen and professionals from the area. Former TULF Parliamentarian of Mannar P. Soosaidasan is from Vankalai. Even now many top bureaucrats of the district hail from Vankalai.

The past years of ethnic strife have seen Vankalai also being affected like many other Tamil villages in the region. In 1985 the Catholic priest Fr. Mary Bastian a native of Vankalai himself and about twenty others were killed by the security forces. In later years a prominent school principal from Vankalai and some others were also killed and dumped in a well by security forces. There have also been many other minor incidents. The climate of terror compelled many residents of Vankalai to relocate to other places in the Island, cross over to India or go abroad to Western Countries.

The ceasefire that came into force from Feb 23rd 2002 gave the people a much needed respite from violence. Vankalai began flourishing . Many refugees from India began to return slowly. Life was blossoming again.

The victims of the Vankalai massacre were members of one such family that returned from India. The husband was 38 year old Sinnaiah Moorthy Martin. The wife was 27 year old Anthony Mary Madeleine. The daughter was 9 year old Anne Lakshika. The son was 7 year old Anne Dilakshan. The family had re – settled in Vankalai about a year and a half ago.

Martin was not a native of Vankalai. He was from Vidathal theevu. He had married Mary Madeleine and settled down in Vankalai. Madeleine also called Chitra was from Vankalai and had many close relatives. Both Children had been named Anne because the St. Annes Church in Vankalai was the family church. Martin was by profession a carpenter.

Several youths from Vankalai had joined the LTTE and other militant movements in the past. Several youths were tiger members even now. The elders of Vankalai had used this “connection” to extract a promise from the LTTE that they should not “camp” in the village or engage in any violent activity there. This was honoured by the LTTE for four years.

With the LTTE not engaging in any hostile action in the vicinity of Vankalai the security personnel also kept the peace. Apart from the Thallady base there was a camp and some security posts in Vankalai too. There was also a Police post. There was very little friction between the people and the security forces in Vankalai. This was the general situation in Mannar district too.

All this began to change after Mahinda Rajapakse became President. Relations between the Government of Sri Lanka (GOSL) and the LTTE began deteriorating. Soon the tigers commenced a “peoples war” . Members of the security forces were targeted . One consequence of this was the shattering of relative peace in Mannar. The landmining of a naval convoy in Pesalai saw the situation in Mannar changing drastically.

More personnel were deployed in the district and security intensified in Mannar. This tightening of security was felt in Vankalai too with security posts being set up in the junctions and even interior. Friction began increasing between the people and security personnel in Vankalai. The situation got aggravated with the induction of a fresh security personnel batch recently. According to Vankalai residents these security men were an uncouth, indisciplined lot. They reveled in uttering obscenities and engaging in indecent gestures. Their favourite target was the school girl population of Vankalai. One act was to exhibit condoms to the girls.

It was against this backdrop that the LTTE broke its pledge to the village elders and struck in the vicinity. On Thursday June 1st a claymore mine was set off on the border of Vankalai and adjacent Naruvilikkulam. A two wheel tractor was taking food to an army chekpost at Naruvilikkulam from Vankalai camp at about 7. 30 pm when the explosion was triggered. One soldier was killed and two injured.

Upon hearing of the landmine incident soldiers stationed at Vankalai camp began firing indiscriminately for nearly 20 minutes till they were brought under control. 42 year old Arulnesan and his 12 year old daughter Lorenzia were injured seriously and admitted later to the Muringan hospital.

The indiscriminate firing made the Vankalai people panic stricken.Initially most families fled Vankalai. They began returning in the next few days. Thereafter people began expecting massive military reprisals and started avoiding staying at home during night. They slept in churches during night. The Vankalai army  camp used to discharge a few rounds of fire regularly in the night.

The situation worsened further when the LTTE threw a grenade on an army patrol near the Eruvittan junction on the Naanaattan – Arippu road on Monday June 5th. There was an exchange of fire for about 10 minutes. One soldier was killed. Later soldiers began assaulting civilians in the area. This caused more insecurity among villages in the region including Vankalai.

The Martin – Madeleine family lived in the 10th ward precincts of Vankalai. Their housing scheme was named “Thomaspuri” or “Thomas township”. It was named after former Catholic Cardinal Thomas Cooray. The adjoining scheme was called “Bastipuri” This was  named after the slain priest Fr. Mary Bastian.

The people of Thomaspuri and Bastipuri went to St. Annes Church in the night for security. On Thursday 8th the elder sister of Chitra or Madeleine started out to Church. The younger sibling said that her husband had not returned yet and asked her “akka” to go on . She said she would follow with her family after the husband returned. The family never went to St. Annes.

On the following morning the elder sister returned and tried to find out why Chitras family had not turned up. There was no answer when she called out. Knocking on the door had no response. Fearing the worst people gathered at the house. The door was kicked open. What they saw horrified them.

Mary Madeleine was dead on the floor lying naked in a pool of blood. There were signs of her being sexually assaulted brutally. The bodies of Martin and the children were hanging inside the room. They had been tortured , beaten and hacked to death. Pieces of rope in the house were used to hang the bodies. The intestines of the boy were protruding. The areas around the girl’s vagina were crimson red with blood. It was feared that she too had been violated.

The carpentry tools of Martin like the “uli” or chisel had also been used to prick, cut and torture the victims. In addition heavier and sharper weapons like knives or bayonets too had been used to hack the victims. Some sado – masochistic persons with a bestial nature had been at work in the house. No firearms were used . The cold – blooded barbarity of a brutal nature defied description. Only people crazed with callous hatred or those whose senses had been distorted through narcotics could have inflicted such gruesome cruelty.

As news of the massacre spread people of Vankalai began gathering at Thomaspuri. They were sad and bitter. The youths in particular were in an angry mood. Their mindset reflected the overall agony and frustration of the Tamil people over an uneasy peace where innocent civilians were getting increasingly victimised. The climate of impunity under the Rajapakse regime was resulting in security personnel and their Tamil para- militaries getting away with murder and mayhem easily and effortlessly.

The preponderant opinion among Vankalai residents was that some security personnel were responsible for the massacre. Besides the general obnoxious conduct by the security men in Vankalai there was a more specific reason too for the suspicion. Apparently three soldiers had been in the neighbourhood on the 8th morning.

According to one woman they had shouted out to her at about 10. 30 am. When she came to the door they had asked her whether she knew Sinhala and whether she was living alone. She had replied in the negative and said her parents had gone to the market. They had asked her for her identity card. She went in and returned with her IC. But they had gone. She alleges that they were at the entrance of the Martin home. She had shut the door and waited inside.

It is suspected that the security personnel had “eyed” Mary Madeleine in the morning and returned later in the night. People of the area say they can identify the three. The reality is that even if the three are identified there is no proof to show they were responsible for the massacre.

Despite the lack of concrete evidence or unavailability of reliable eye- witnesses the people on the whole began pointing their finger at the security forces. When the Police and Army arrived an enraged crowd in its hundreds refused to let them proceed. People also began shouting slogans against the Vankalai army camp. Fearing a heavy breach of peace additional troops from Thalladdy and Riot Policemen were deployed in Vankalai.

An ugly situation was averted due to many members of the Catholic clergy and senior Government officials arriving at the scene. The Vicar – General for Mannar Rev, Fr, Xavier Crusz was himself from Vankalai. So too was the Mannar AGA Ms. Stanley de Mel. TNA Parliamentarian from Wanni district Vinothaharajalingam also arrived on the scene. The Mannar Bishop Joseph Rayappu also came to the scene of the massacre.

Thanks to the eforts of these persons the passions of the people were contained. Bishop Rayappu was visibly moved. When questioned by the BBC Tamil Service the Bishop said that people whose duty was to ensure the protection and security of the people were allegedly responsible for this violence.

Mannar additional magistrate TJ Prabakharan arrived on the scene and conducted preliminary inquiries. He ordered an autopsy of the bodies and recorded initial statements of some people. He directed that some pieces of evidence be sent for forensic analysis. Mr. Prabakharan scheduled a judicial inquiry and inquest for June 23rd. He ordered the Police to apprehend suspect sand conduct an identification parade on that day. He also directed the army and Police chief of the area to be present on the 23rd.

The bodies of the victims were released on Friday evening. They were kept at the Vankalai school for the public to pay their respects. On Saturday 10th the bodies were taken in procession to St. Annes Church for funeral mass. About 5000 people were in the funeral procession. The Bishop and Vicar – General of Mannar conducted the service with about 25 priests assisting. The four bodies were then taken to the Vankalai burial grounds and laid to rest in a single grave. One more Tamil family had been wiped out in a vicious campaign of violence.

Defence Ministry Spkesperson Brig. Prasad Samarasinghe when questioned by the media denied that the army was responsible. “The security forces have never done such a thing” he said. He said the tigers were responsible. Some newspapers quoting Police sources also said the LTTE was responsible. According to this version the victims were army informants. The LTTE had taken revenge in a brutal way due to this.

The cycle of violence continues in Sri Lanka. The violence committed by the LTTE is dutifully recorded and branded as terrorism by the authorities, media and International Community. The violence perpetrated by the state and its organs both official and unofficial are not condemned in equal manner. Unless the Sinhala people, responsible media sections and the International community realise that unadulterated state terror is being unleashed on innocent Tamil civilians by the Rajapakse regime no end seems to be in sight .

Meanwhile the wheels of justice would begin to grind slowly on June 23rd in the case of the Vankalai killings. With all due respect to the Mannar judiciary there seems to be absolutely no chance that justice would be done. From the Bindunuwewa massacre to this Vankalai violence the people responsible have got away and will get away. This is the past, present and future as far as the Tamil civilian victims are concerned.
